---
title: "‘The Modern Girl’"
---

## ‘The Modern Girl’

**Author:** Mary Eliza? Bramston
**Date:** 1886
**Imprint:** <i>MP</i>  (February 1886), 191-2

### Notes

Signed ‘Middleage’, and the work of [[person:198]Mary Eliza Bramston], or less probably, her half-sister Anna Rachel Bramston.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
